message:
test(server,cli): add 57 tests for analytics and e2e_artifacts modules

- analytics (31 new → 55 total): severity filter cycle/labels/includes matrix,
  sort mode cycle/labels, focus toggle/labels, severity_rank ordering,
  format_error_rate edge cases, perceived_luma (black/white/green>red),
  scroll saturation, copyable_content, sort_card_indices with severity sort,
  cycle_*_wraps_around, persisted feed empty/baseline, parse_deep_link all
  screen/agent/unknown targets, AnalyticsVizSnapshot default, Home/End keys,
  fast scroll (J/K)
- e2e_artifacts (26 new → 32 total): ClockMode default/as_str/display/serde,
  SeededRng seeds differ/next_id format/state masked, TestCounters default,
  Counts default/serde, GitInfo default/serde, Summary fields, Meta
  determinism info, Metrics duration/negative clamped, Repro command format,
  Fixtures schema, TraceEvent to_jsonl, classify_artifact known/prefix paths,
  DeterminismInfo/BundleSchema/ArtifactRef/BundleFile/TimingInfo serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
